feature.name: Web Speech API contextual biasing
feature.creator: yrw@google.com
feature.summary:
This feature enables websites to support contextual biasing for speech recognition by adding a recognition phrase list to the Web Speech API.

Developers can provide a list of phrases as well as updating them to apply a bias to the speech recognition models in favor of those phrases. This helps improve accuracy and relevance for domain-specific and personalized speech recognition.

adoption.finding: The WebDX/WebFeature counter 'SpeechRecognition' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 63) measured 0.0298% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2024-06-10 with 578 data points. Mapping confidence: declared-family.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures the SpeechRecognition family/property, not this specific feature. Does not isolate the Chrome 142 increment.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.
